programme.title: Home Matcha Bar with Tastemade
programme.desc: Get your matcha in check! Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar or scan the QR code!

programme.title: Produce Meal Prep with Tastemade
programme.desc: Simplify your week and make the most of your fresh produce. We're diving into smart, stress-free ways to prep fruits and veggies so you're always just a few steps away from a healthy, delicious meal. Whether it's dinner, lunch, or a quick snack, future you will be glad you planned ahead.

programme.title: Freezer Friendly Meal Prep with Tastemade
programme.desc: Save time, stress less, and stock up smart. We’re prepping tasty, freezer-ready meals to help future you win at dinnertime or whenever else you're hungry. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Best Deals with The French Glow
programme.desc: Deal expert The French Glow breaks down the latest and greatest deals. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Deep Into the Night
programme.desc: The moment the Yankees beat the Red Sox in the 2003 ALCS, the greatest rivalry in sports reaches its zenith, with the Bombers dynasty looking as indominable and inevitable as ever, and a rising Red Sox club turned aside. And in the middle of it all is Aaron Boone – a midseason addition to the Yanks from a baseball family – a truly unlikely hero.

programme.title: The Price of Winning
programme.desc: The 1987 Edmonton Oilers entered the Stanley Cup Finals as the greatest hockey team ever, boasting 7 future Hall of Famers and two Stanley Cups under their belt. The Philadelphia Flyers, on the other hand, entered the series with a rookie goalie as their only hope, playing like they had nothing to lose. What resulted from this matchup was one of the most iconic Game 7s in hockey history.

programme.title: Los Angeles Breakfast Polenta and Thai Tailgate
programme.desc: Chef Bruce Kalman creates an unforgettable UCLA breakfast; Chef Tin Vuong throws down a Thai tailgate at USC.

programme.title: South Carolina Beef Ribs and Florida Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Boiled peanuts and beef ribs at a South Carolina tailgate; a morning shrimping trip on the Florida Gulf.

programme.title: Michigan Coney Dogs and Ohio State Po' Boys
programme.desc: Chef Frank Fejeran takes us on a trip to a beautiful Buddhist farm and makes the classic Michigan Coney Dog.

programme.title: Best Deals with The French Glow
programme.desc: Deal expert The French Glow breaks down the latest and greatest deals. Shop while you watch: just head to the Amazon shopping app on mobile and type "shop the show" in the search bar!

programme.title: Buffalo Mozzarella and Eggplant
programme.desc: Nadia continues her culinary journey to Campania, the heart of her family's pasta dynasty. Starting with a classic Caprese Salad, Nadia pays homage to the colors of the Italian flag. For the main course, she shares her Nonna-approved Eggplant Parmigiana. Join Nadia as she checks items off of her bucket list and embraces life's delightful surprises!

programme.title: Lemons and Limoncello
programme.desc: Nadia takes inspiration from family traditions and creates three new dishes with classic origins. Inspired by a visit to one of the oldest lemon groves in the Campania region, Nadia creates a lemon-infused pasta and limoncello cocktail using Sorrento’s famous citrus fruits. After serving up an ancient Italian fable, Nadia innovates one of her family’s favorite pasta bakes.

programme.title: Italian Comfort Food
programme.desc: Nadia explores what makes the ultimate Italian comfort food, a journey that takes her from the Ancient Amphitheatre of Capua to her cousins’ family farm to harvest potatoes. With this knowledge, she makes two comforting classics: Gnocchi alla Sorrentina and Pastina in Brodo. These soothing dishes will make anyone’s troubles go away!

programme.title: Truffles and Prosciutto di Parma
programme.desc: As her culinary tour of Emilia-Romagna comes to a close, Nadia explores some of the region's decadent delicacies to make surprisingly simple dishes: Tagliolini al Tartufo and Pizza e Fichi. Since The Pasta Queen always cooks with the freshest ingredients, she travels to Valsamoggia to learn how to hunt for truffles before stopping in Langhirano to learn all about Prosciutto Di Parma.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nebraska Whitetails
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head to Nebraska's Sandhills for a whitetail deer hunt, guided by Jordan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Ducks
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins Jean-Paul Bourgeois and Ronnie Collins in Louisiana‚ Mississippi Delta for a duck hunt. Surrounded by the unique landscape of the Delta, they target multiple duck species. After a successful hunt, the team returns to camp, where Jean-Paul prepares a traditional Cajun meal featuring the day‚ catch. Experience the cultural tradition of turning fresh game into flavorful, local dishes like duck gumbo and crawfish boil.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Hogs and Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella, Ryan Callahan, and Danny Bolton travel to Hawaii's Big Island for a unique hunt. They stalk feral sheep in the lush mountainsides and target wild hogs on a coffee plantation, using the animals' movements through macadamia groves to their advantage. The episode highlights Hawaii's blend of hunting and conservation, ending with a Hawaiian-style feast featuring the fresh game they harvested.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hawaii Spearfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with spearfishing champions Danny Bolton and Kimi Werner.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose
programme.desc: In this episode of MeatEater, Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head into Alaska's remote interior.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Black Bear
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve introduces Randall Williams and Clay Newcomb to his fish shack in Prince of Wales, Alaska where they fish for cod, set shrimp pots and hunt for black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Michigan Squirrels and Rabbits
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve jets off to his home state of Michigan to hunt for small game with friends Guy Zuck and Kevin Murphy.

programme.title: MeatEater - Idaho Mule Deer
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful.

programme.title: MeatEater - Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve and Janis Putelis are in Florida with local, Richard Martinez, in search for the illusive Osceola Turkey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater - Texas Turkey with Luke Combs
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to Tanzania
programme.desc: Steven Rinella travels to Tanzania for his first African safari with professional hunter, Morgan Potter. In this episode, Morgan and his team show Steve the ropes of hunting in this foreign terrain for otherworldly big game species. Steve's quest for a cape buffalo moves to the side burner when the team discovers an impressive roan antelope.

programme.title: El parto
programme.desc: Silvia comienza el trabajo de parto en el departamento, no hay tiempo para llegar al hospital. Luis recibirá al bebé con la ayuda de los vecinos.

programme.title: Vecinos consejeros
programme.desc: El hijo de Silvia y Luis no para de llorar y ya no saben qué hacer. Los vecinos les aconsejan cómo cuidar al bebé mientras Germán improvisa un gimnasio en el vestíbulo.

programme.title: Mucha luz
programme.desc: Hay fallas de energía eléctrica en algunos de los departamentos y Luis tiene que ir a trabajar al departamento de los López Pérez. Germán se prepara para su examen de admisión a la preparatoria en línea.

programme.title: Ya valió barriga
programme.desc: Un nuevo inquilino llega al departamento, su nombre es: Hipólito Menchaca y tiene un gran parecido con el famoso actor Édgar Vivar. Los vecinos quieren quedar bien con él.

programme.title: La jefa del Rocko
programme.desc: La mamá de Rocko viene a conocer a su nieto Morris y tiene la intención de llevarlo a vivir con ella y darle la vida que se merece. Liz se vuelve representante de Benito y le consigue un papel en una película.

programme.title: Conserjerito inglés
programme.desc: Germán y compañía toman clases de inglés en línea con Silvia. Cuando Miss Silvia reprueba a Germán, este descubre la forma de desquitarse. Rocko tiene problemas de oído y creen que se está quedando sordo.

programme.title: La toalla del mojado 2
programme.desc: Frankie recibe una visita inesperada, la famosa actriz Lyn May, quien lo inspira a que haga la película de La toalla del mojado 2. Pedro se encarga de cuidar a Luisito Jr. para que Luis pueda descansar.

programme.title: La veterinaria de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa por fin cumple el sueño de tener su propia veterinaria y, con ayuda de su novio Fabián, renta el local que está en el edificio. Los López Pérez compran una lavadora nueva y la colocan en el pasillo frente al departamento de Luis.

programme.title: ¡Qué escándalo!
programme.desc: Morris aprende a tocar la batería y los vecinos se quejan por el ruido. Silvia y Luis descubren que ese ruido arrulla al bebé.

programme.title: Arturo influencer
programme.desc: Arturo se vuelve un famoso influencer de TikTok y Paco de Miguel lo busca para una colaboración. Cris recibe la visita de su hermana Esmeralda y Pedro se siente desplazado.

programme.title: El novio de Virginia
programme.desc: Silvia acude a un diplomado que dura dos días y quiere contratar a una niñera, pero Luis no está de acuerdo. Virginia le quiere declarar su amor a un chico y Germán piensa que es él.

programme.title: Bebé a bordo
programme.desc: En el segundo día del diplomado de Silvia, Luisito Jr. queda al cuidado de Pedrito, pero este permite que todos los vecinos lo cuiden y en un descuido pierden al bebé.

programme.title: Atorón
programme.desc: Es el aniversario de Benito y de Liz, pero él no tiene dinero para festejarlo, por lo que ella le pone un ultimátum para continuar con su relación. Luis y Magda discuten porque ambos quieren usar las escaleras.

programme.title: Primera palabra
programme.desc: Liz ha encontrado el lugar perfecto para que ella y Benito vivan juntos pero, ¿Benito dejará la casa de sus padres? El bebé Luisito ha dicho su primera palabra, pero Luis cree que a Silvita no le gustará cuando se entere de qué ha dicho su hijo.

programme.title: El bautizo
programme.desc: Silvita y Luis bautizarán al bebé Luisito. ¿Quiénes serán sus padrinos? Además, ¿qué tendrá que pasar para que Germán sea invitado a este evento? Benito abandona la vecindad por siempre.

programme.title: No se vende
programme.desc: La dueña del edificio falleció y sus dos hijas, 'Maty' y 'Mony' se lo disputan, dejando en medio a los vecinos y a punto de ser desalojados.

programme.title: Regresó Ale
programme.desc: Ale regresa a casa con su familia. Descubre cuál será su reacción al verla de nuevo. Además, Benito gana una audición para una serie.

programme.title: La cisterna y el charro negro
programme.desc: Los vecinos están preocupados porque el agua de la cisterna sale muy sucia.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
